name: @wui-js/plugins
description: WUI/JS Plugins Lib - WUI/JS Plugins Lib is an open-source JavaScript/CSS library that provides a collection of plugins for WUI/JS Main Lib classes.
author: Sergio E. Belmar V. <wuijs.project@gmail.com>

scripts.prepack: cp README.md _README.bak && cp NPM.md README.md && mv src/wui-js/plugins/LICENCE _LICENCE.bak 2>/dev/null; cp -r src/wui-js/plugins/. .
scripts.postpack: mv _README.bak README.md && ls src/wui-js/plugins/ | xargs rm -rf && cp src/wui-js/plugins/LICENSE . && mv _LICENCE.bak src/wui-js/plugins/LICENCE 2>/dev/null; true
